role.scope: Review supplied public-safe evidence for a bounded task.
role.responsibility: Classify worker claims as accepted, rejected, or needs evidence.

capability.description: Review generated claims against supplied source artifacts.

implementations.name: qwen3-coder-next:latest
implementations.fit_notes: Useful for proposal review when source evidence is explicit.

implementations.name: FreshForge or project-native CLI
implementations.fit_notes: Use when the project already has a deterministic command, report, or validation surface.

implementations.name: paid supervisor model
implementations.fit_notes: Use when verification risk or private context makes local delegation poor.

selection_policy.model_swap_rule: A workflow may swap implementations only when the role and capability stay unchanged, project-native tools remain authoritative for execution, and the implementation authority ceiling satisfies the capability.
selection_policy.default_bailout: Use supervisor-owned implementation when records are poor or evidence is private.
